mapper.insert: INSERT INTO idempotency_keys (idempotency_key, user_id, request_hash, txn_id, status, error_code, response_snapshot, created_at, updated_at, retry_count) VALUES (#{idempotencyKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{requestHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{txnId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{responseSnapshot,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{retryCount,jdbcType=INTEGER})
mapper.select: SELECT idempotency_key, user_id, request_hash, txn_id, status, error_code, response_snapshot, created_at, updated_at, retry_count FROM idempotency_keys WHERE idempotency_key = #{uniqueRequestId}
SELECT idempotency_key, user_id, request_hash, txn_id, status, error_code, response_snapshot, created_at, updated_at, retry_count FROM idempotency_keys WHERE txn_id = #{txnId}
mapper.update: UPDATE idempotency_keys SET status = #{status}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE txn_id = #{txnId}
